'''Uncooked Rice''' is a material used to craft Rice related items.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Uncooked rice.png
| id = uncooked_rice
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Rice
| stackable = 64
}}

==Obtaining==
===Grinding===

* '''<code>Sneak + Right click</code>''' [[Rice Grains]] on a [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Grindstone Grindstone] to dehull the rice.

== Used In ==

* [[Uncooked Rice in a Bowl]]
* [[Koji]]

==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
